events.title: I really don’t care much about US and Israel...
events.desc:
I really don’t care much about US and Israel policy towards Iran. I dont think we should be involved and I suspect it will cause chaos and suffering and drive more refugess towards us

On the other hand it’s really hard to be upset about seeing the Islamist nut jobs under attack and the Iranian people being helped to rise up against them.

So I’m pretty much on the fence.

What I want to see is this:

Our politicians launching emergency sessions in Parliament to ensure that we are ready to turn away the waves of refugees that will arise. That means better operational solutions in the Channel and partial withdrawal from ECHR in relation to matters pertaining to immigration status and enforcement.

I want to see them discussing this on Monday morning.

Not arguing about the rights and wrongs of foreign powers’ policy choices.  MAGA this and Israel that and Ayatollah the others. Dont care. Not interested. We cannot change it.

We can fix our own domestic policies to protect our own people from the fall out…

events.title: OPERATION EPIC FURY: Well it’s been done. We...
events.desc:
OPERATION EPIC FURY: Well it’s been done. We have hammered Iran. There are 3 main views in my circles about President Trump joining the US and Israel together to strike Iran in the middle of a Friday night. 

1. He told the Iranian people we would help them. Here comes the cavalry. This is their best chance at freedom.
2. They said attack Iran or we release the videos Trump said “Sir, yes, sir.” In other words, he is controlled. 
3. To create peace, the enemies of peace must be dealt with. This is what peace through strength looks like. Regime change is in order. Iran must never have nuclear weapons. 

I remember March 2003 well. Beware the Ides or March. 

We pray for our military and the people of Iran. We pray for President Trump. He is the Commander in Chief. We pray targeted strikes are effective and achieve our mission and. The initial targets appear to be Iranian regime HQ.

Whatever position you hold could you agree with me we need to pray for and totally support our service members in the Middle East? 🇺🇸🦅
